creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Having two versions of xorg-server installed means that your 
ports/package database is in inconsistent state.  Taking this situation 
into account is practically impossible since one cannot foresee possible 
implications.  Taking care of described specific issue would, in turn, 
further complicate Makefile logic, which is already far from being 
clear.  These situations are typically resolved by special tools like 
pkgdb(1) et al, and they do their job well enough.  It is certainly not 
nvidia-driver or any other, FWIW, port's responsibility.
